name: Steak & Green Bean Potato Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 pound potatoes, cooked, cubed and cooled
1 package frozen cut green beans, thawed (9oz.)
3/4 pound sliced grilled steak or deli roast beef
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the dressing and horseradish.
2. Add the potatoes, green beans, and onion; toss to coat evenly.
3. Arrange the beef and potato salad on a chilled large platter.
